_comment: Wandering Cultivator Camp (游方修士营地) — a small camp structure that generates in the wandering_cultivator_camp biome of the Starry Sky dimension. Canon: temporary gathering point for rogue cultivators traveling between planets. Stand-in: a small end_city piece (floating platform with shelter). Final: custom NBT template with tents, spirit-stone campfire, and a teleportation anchor. The simulation spawns wandering cultivator NPCs near these camps.
